notes: Alex should match Engineering and open-to-all scholarships. Should NOT match Arts, Medicine, Social Sciences, or financial need only scholarships.

demo_scenarios.description: Hackathon with Tuesday 2-5pm sessions clashes with COMP3230 Lab — agent flags and suggests alternative timing
Peter H.M. Lau AI Scholarship (ss_663) surfaces as strong match — CS programme directly matches AI and Data Systems focus
Innovation and Technology Scholarship (ss_395) — non-final year required, Alex qualifies, show this as strong match
Peter H.M. Lau Penultimate Year Scholarship (ss_662) — eligible next year as Year 3, agent bookmarks it
